req.title: Create patient (negative)
req.statement: A registered clinician shall create a patient resource with validated demographics; creation with missing mandatory elements shall be rejected. Negative paths including permission denial, missing mandatory elements, and conflicting state transitions must be tested.

tests.name: naive_case

"""
pytest test suite for Patient Resource Creation by Registered Clinician
Requirement: A registered clinician shall create a patient resource with validated
demographics; creation with missing mandatory elements shall be rejected.
Negative paths including permission denial, missing mandatory elements,
and conflicting state transitions must be tested.
"""

import pytest
import uuid
from datetime import date, datetime
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
from http import HTTPStatus

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain / application layer stubs
# Adjust import paths to match your real project structure.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
from app.models.patient import Patient, PatientStatus
from app.models.user import User, Role
from app.services.patient_service import PatientService
from app.exceptions import (
    AuthorizationError,
    ValidationError,
    DuplicateResourceError,
    InvalidStateTransitionError,
)
from app.repositories.patient_repository import PatientRepository


# ===========================================================================
# Fixtures
# ===========================================================================


@pytest.fixture
def patient_repo():
    """In-memory / mock repository to avoid a real DB."""
    repo = MagicMock(spec=PatientRepository)
    repo.find_by_id.return_value = None
    repo.find_by_nhs_number.return_value = None
    repo.save.side_effect = lambda p: p  # echo the patient back
    return repo


@pytest.fixture
def patient_service(patient_repo):
    return PatientService(repository=patient_repo)


@pytest.fixture

    """A fully authenticated, active clinician with patient-write permission."""
    return User(

        username="dr.smith",
        role=Role.CLINICIAN,
        is_active=True,
        permissions=["patient:create", "patient:read",
